environment_setup.filesystem_state: Jupyter Notebook execution via CLI. The notebook contains a heavy query that takes 3 minutes.

evaluation_loop.condition: Execute the automated Jupyter Notebook report and convert it to HTML.

injected_failure_state.observation: TimeoutError: Cell execution timed out, see log for details. (Default timeout is 30s)

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent notices the default timeout crash, adds the '--ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=-1' flag to disable the timeout, and retries.
